name: Chipotle Salsa
recipeIngredient: 30 dried chipotle chiles OR 3 cups chipotle chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce to a simmer and cook, uncovered, about 20 minutes.
- The liquid should reduce by one-third and the tomato skins should be falling off.
4. Set aside to cool.
5. Pour mixture into a blender or food processor fitted with the metal blade.
6. Puree until smooth and then pass through a strainer.
7. Serve chilled.
Chipotle salsa can be stored in the refrigerator up to 5 days or frozen.
